name: Sourdough Pizza Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bread machine.
- For Sanyo/Seiko machines, use: 6 tablespoons Milk (plus 2 teaspoons), 2/3 cup Sourdough Starter, 2 tablespoons Sugar, 1 Egg Yolk, beaten, 1/2 teaspoon Salt, 1 tablespoon Butter, melted, 1/4 teaspoon Basil, crumbled, 1/4 teaspoon Oregano, crumbled, 2 tablespoons Parmesan Cheese, 2 tablespoons Pepperoni, finely minced, and 3 cups Flour. Add 1 1/2 teaspoons Yeast.
2. Follow the machine settings as indicated in the recipe.
3. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before combining to achieve optimal results.
